description: Approved immutable historical migration prefix collisions. This ledger is read by mom/tools/release/check_migration_drift.php so new collisions still fail while known production-history collisions remain explicit.

approved_prefix_collisions.rationale: Both files are already present on origin/main and are referenced by schema/contract evidence. Renumbering would create fresh pending migrations for already-governed history.
Both files are already present on origin/main and are idempotent historical schema changes. Keep explicit allow-list instead of renumbering applied history.
188_error_code_registry is a forensic restoration for a live schema_migrations row; preserving the filename prevents reintroducing the ghost-migration failure documented by the drift detector.
